alternatives.name: Dumbbell Goblet Squat
alternatives.description: Hold a dumbbell at chest height and squat.

alternatives.name: Bodyweight Squat
alternatives.description: Standard air squat using only your body weight.

alternatives.name: Resistance Band Squat
alternatives.description: Step on a band and hold the handles at shoulder height while squatting.

alternatives.name: Dumbbell Chest Press
alternatives.description: Press dumbbells while lying on the floor or a bench.

alternatives.name: Resistance Band Chest Press
alternatives.description: Anchor a band behind you and press forward.
